title: Fifth and sixth assistant district attorney
doc_html:
§329. Fifth and sixth assistant district attorney

           The offices of fifth and sixth assistant district attorney for the Fifteenth Judicial District of Louisiana are hereby created.

           Added by Acts 1971, No. 63, §1.
doc_text:
§329.  Fifth and sixth assistant district attorney
The offices of fifth and sixth assistant district attorney for the Fifteenth
Judicial District of Louisiana are hereby created.
Added by Acts 1971, No. 63, §1.
